mapper.update: UPDATE clazz SET name = #{name}, room = #{room}, begin_date = #{beginDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, master_id = #{masterId}, subject = #{subject}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date AS beginDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.master_id AS masterId, c.subject, e.name AS masterName, c.create_time AS createTime, c.update_time AS updateTime, CASE WHEN CURDATE() < c.begin_date THEN '未开班' WHEN CURDATE() BETWEEN c.begin_date AND c.end_date THEN '已开班' WHEN CURDATE() > c.end_date THEN '已结课' ELSE '未知状态' END AS status FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.master_id = e.id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND c.end_date BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end}
ORDER BY c.update_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date AS beginDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.master_id AS masterId, c.subject, c.create_time AS createTime, c.update_time AS updateTime FROM clazz c WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date AS beginDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.master_id AS masterId, c.subject, c.create_time AS createTime, c.update_time AS updateTime FROM clazz c
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clazz(name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId},#{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
